touches.ai_summary: Inbound demo request from Ethan Smith at NimbusTech. Expressed interest in improving pipeline visibility for their sales team. Mentioned they're currently evaluating a few solutions including Chorus.

Brief qualification call with Ethan (Head of RevOps). Confirmed team size of 4 sales reps, current pain point around forecasting accuracy. Ethan is the primary evaluator, reports to VP Sales. Timeline is 4-6 weeks to close.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the urgency to solve this now?
questions_asked.answer: We missed forecast last two quarters and leadership wants better visibility before Q3.

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Chorus?
questions_asked.answer: We're competitive and can work within your budget. Let's discuss fit first, then we'll get into specifics.

next_steps: Ethan to loop in Sales Manager

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with discovery questions and product overview deck. Ethan confirmed availability for discovery call next week and mentioned bringing Camila Turner (Sales Manager) into the conversation.
next_steps: Discovery call scheduled with Ethan and Camila

touches.ai_summary: Email recap of discovery session. Confirmed unlimited automation tier aligns with their workflow needs. Ethan asked for references from similar-sized fintech companies. No mention of executive involvement yet.

questions_asked.question: Do you have customers in fintech who've seen ROI quickly?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, shared two case studies from similar profiles with 3-month payback periods.

touches.ai_summary: Check-in email after demo. Ethan responded positively about the product but mentioned procurement (Camila) will need to review pricing in detail. Still no executive mentioned in thread. Asked about discount potential given budget constraints.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on the list price for a multi-year commit?
questions_asked.answer: We can definitely structure a proposal that works. Let's set up a call to discuss terms.

touches.ai_summary: Quick exec alignment call with Ethan. He mentioned his VP is traveling but he has authority to move forward. Walked through proposed pricing with 40% discount to meet budget. Ethan seemed hesitant on timeline, wants to finalize before end of quarter.

questions_asked.question: When can we get your VP's input on the business case?
questions_asked.answer: He trusts my recommendation. I'll brief him async, but I'm the decision-maker here.

objections: Pricing still above budget even with discount

touches.ai_summary: Sent revised proposal with 39.9% discount and flexible payment terms. Ethan acknowledged receipt but mentioned Camila is comparing final numbers against Chorus quote. Requested additional implementation support as part of the deal.

Follow-up on proposal status. Ethan replied that they're close but Camila needs clarification on contract terms and wants to understand onboarding timeline. Rep offered pricing call to address final questions.

questions_asked.question: If we sign this week, when can we go live?
questions_asked.answer: Onboarding typically takes 2 weeks. We can prioritize your team for an early June kickoff.

next_steps: Schedule pricing/terms call with Ethan and Camila

touches.ai_summary: Final pricing call with Ethan to review terms and answer Camila's procurement questions. Discussed contract length, auto-renewal clauses, and implementation timeline. Ethan seemed satisfied and committed to internal approval process. Still no executive directly engaged, relying on Ethan's sign-off authority.

questions_asked.question: Is there anything else blocking us from moving to signature?
questions_asked.answer: Just final approval from finance, but that's usually quick. Should have an answer by Friday.

questions_asked.question: Can we include an opt-out after year one if adoption is low?
questions_asked.answer: Our standard terms are firm on annual commits, but we can add quarterly business reviews to ensure you're getting value.

objections: Concern about being locked into annual contract without exec visibility into ROI
next_steps: Ethan to route through finance and legal

outcome.churn_reason: did not see enough ROI for the price
